hero.badge: Sake Amfani da Abun ciki ta AI
hero.title: Juya Bidiyo Guda Zuwa
hero.subtitle: Manna hanyar haɗi ko loda fayil — AI ta rubuta kuma ta sake amfani da abun cikin ku ta atomatik zuwa rubutun blog, jerin sada zumunta, wasiƙun labarai, da ƙari.
hero.accent: Sau 10 na fitar da abun cikin ku.
hero.placeholder: Manna hanyar haɗin YouTube, podcast, ko kowane bidiyo...

steps.title: Manna ko Loda
steps.desc: Saka hanyar haɗin YouTube, loda fayil mai sauti, ko manna rubutu. Babu buƙatar saiti — danna ɗaya kawai.

steps.title: AI Ta Yi Sihirinta
steps.desc: AI ɗin mu tana rubutawa da fahimtar abun cikin ku, sannan ta sake rubuta shi da hikima don salon kowane dandamali.

steps.title: Buga Ko'ina
steps.desc: Sami ingantaccen abun ciki don WeChat, Twitter, LinkedIn, Xiaohongshu, blogs, da ƙari. Kwafi, sauke, ko raba nan take.

features.label: Fasaloli
features.title: Duk Abin Da Kuke Bukata Don
features.subtitle: An gina shi don masu ƙirƙira waɗanda ke son haɓaka kowane ɓangaren abun cikin da suke samarwa.

list.title: Sake Rubutu ta AI
list.desc: Ba rubutu kawai ba — AI ɗin mu tana fahimtar mahallin kuma ta sake rubutawa don murya da tsarin kowane dandamali.

list.title: Tsarin Fitarwa 10
list.desc: Rubutun blog, jerin Twitter, posts na LinkedIn, bayanan Xiaohongshu, wasiƙun labarai, SRT subtitles, labaran SEO, da ƙari.

list.title: Harsuna 63+
list.desc: Rubuta da ƙirƙirar abun ciki cikin harsuna sama da 63. Daidai ga masu ƙirƙira na duniya da masu sauraro na duniya.

list.title: Samar da Streaming
list.desc: Ganin abun ciki yana bayyana harafi da harafi a ainihin lokaci. Babu jiran maɓallan lodi.

list.title: Gyara Ta Hira
list.desc: Yi hira da kowane fitarwa don daidaita shi. Ka ce "taƙaita" ko "ƙara emoji" — AI ta yi nan take.

list.title: Tsarin Fitarwa 6
list.desc: Sauke a matsayin Markdown, TXT, PDF, DOCX, SRT, ko CSV. Shirye kai tsaye don bugawa.

list.title: Raba & Haɗa Kai
list.desc: Ƙirƙiri hanyoyin haɗi masu rabawa don abokan aikinku su gani da haɗa kai kan abun ciki.

list.title: Sirri & Amintacce
list.desc: Abun cikin ku ya kasance naku. Ana share fayiloli ta atomatik bayan aiki. Babu adana bayanai.

list.title: Gano Dandamali Mai Hikima
list.desc: Ka manna hanyar haɗin YouTube? Muna ba da shawarar blog + Twitter. Ka manna Bilibili? Muna ba da shawarar WeChat + Xiaohongshu.

formats.outputSubtitle: Ƙirƙira duka lokaci guda — babu buƙatar gudanar da kayan aiki sau da yawa.
formats.langSubtitle: Rubuta da ƙirƙirar abun ciki cikin harsuna sama da 63. Daidai ga masu ƙirƙira na duniya da masu sauraro na duniya.

testimonials.text: "A ƙarshe kayan aiki da ya fahimci tsarin ƙirƙirar abun ciki. Bidiyo ɗaya → duk dandamali cikin mintuna. Canji ne ga jadawalin abun ciki na."
testimonials.author: Sarah Chen

testimonials.text: "Gyaran ta hira yana da hazaka. Ina iya daidaita kowane fitarwa ta hanyar yin hira da shi. Yana ceton ni sa'o'i kowane mako."
testimonials.author: Marcus Rivera

testimonials.text: "Na yi shakka game da abun cikin AI, amma ingancin ya ba ni mamaki da gaske. Tsarin dandamali na musamman ya yi daidai."
testimonials.author: Yuki Tanaka

testimonials.text: "A matsayina na wanda ya kafa kamfani ni kaɗai, wannan kayan aiki yana ba ni fitarwar ƙungiyar abun ciki. Posts na LinkedIn, blogs, tweets — duk daga bidiyo ɗaya."
testimonials.author: Alex Park

pricing.label: Farashi
pricing.title: Sauƙi,
pricing.subtitle: Fara kyauta, haɓaka lokacin da kuke buƙata. Babu kuɗaɗen ɓoye.

creator.name: Mai Ƙirƙira
creator.desc: Ga masu ƙirƙira abun ciki masu mahimmanci

cta.title: Kuna Shirye Don
cta.subtitle: Ku haɗa da dubban masu ƙirƙira waɗanda ke juya kowane bidiyo zuwa cikakkiyar dabarun abun ciki na dandamali da yawa. Fara kyauta — babu buƙatar katin kiredit.

footer.tagline: Sake amfani da abun ciki ta AI. Juya bidiyo ɗaya zuwa duk dabarun abun cikin ku na dandamali da yawa.
footer.builtWith: An gina shi don masu ƙirƙira abun ciki a duniya
